text: Planning a trip always excites me, from choosing the destination to booking flights and researching local customs. When I travel, I love immersing myself in new cultures—visiting markets, temples, or simply watching daily life unfold. Trying local food is a highlight, even if I can't always identify every ingredient. Language barriers can be challenging, but a smile and a few basic phrases go a long way. Once, I ordered a dish by pointing at a stranger's plate. It wasn’t what I expected, but it was delicious. These moments create lasting memories that make every journey unforgettable, reminding me how rewarding stepping out of my comfort zone can be.
